# sedai_resource_settings (Data Source)

Read the current settings for a specific Sedai-managed resource. Returns the availability/optimization modes and the resource type as reported by the backend.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `resource_id` (String) The Sedai resource ID to read settings for.

### Read-Only

- `availability_mode` (String) The resource's current availability mode (`DATA_PILOT`, `CO_PILOT`, or `AUTO`).
- `optimization_mode` (String) The resource's current optimization mode (`DATA_PILOT`, `CO_PILOT`, or `AUTO`).
- `resource_type` (String) The resource type as reported by the backend (e.g. `AWS_LAMBDA`, `AWS_EC2`).
- `sedai_sync_enabled` (Boolean) Whether Sedai auto-syncs this resource with the latest configuration.
